prompt: Select the correct tool, material, or replacement approach and explain why the observed choice is wrong.
scenario: In a T5 work setting, the evaluated element is M-301 Bearings & seals within 2.7 Equipment & Machinery. The relevant subcategory is 2.7.3 Rotating Equipment. The observed field condition is: mechanical seal face contamination from bare-hand touch. The work is being assessed at the staged lifecycle state with source anchors SKF/Timken mounting guides.
title: T5 M-301 Tool & material selection
